text: Prime Minister Narendra Modi met with representatives from Tata Group and Infosys in New Delhi on Friday to discuss investment opportunities in Maharashtra and Karnataka.
Farmers across the region are reporting one of the best harvests in a decade, thanks to favorable monsoon patterns and improved irrigation techniques introduced last year.
Reliance Industries announced a partnership with Google and Facebook to expand digital services across India, with CEO Mukesh Ambani calling it a landmark deal.
